hero.headline: When others quote *$12,000*, we fix it for real
hero.subheadline: Same-day service in Wilmington. No upsells, no BS — just honest HVAC work that actually solves your problem.

services_section.label: THE WORK
services_section.heading: AC, Heat, Ductwork — Fixed Right
services_section.subheading: We diagnose the real problem before we quote you anything

services.title: AC Repair & Installation
services.description: From quick fixes to full system replacements. We'll tell you what you actually need, not what makes us the most money.

services.title: Heating System Service
services.description: Heat pumps, gas furnaces, electric units. Winter breakdowns get priority — we know how cold Wilmington gets.

services.title: Ductwork & Ventilation
services.description: New lines, repairs, replacements. Proper airflow means your system works less and lasts longer.

services.title: System Diagnostics
services.description: Sometimes the 'broken' unit just needs a $50 part. We find the real issue before suggesting anything big.

about.heading: Tony & Trevor — Real HVAC, Real People
about.body: Father and son team serving Wilmington with honest HVAC work. No high-pressure sales, no mystery fees. When your AC quits or your heat won't fire up, we show up with tools and solutions — not a stack of expensive estimates. 433 five-star reviews don't lie.

reviews.name: Bert C.
reviews.text: Tony and Trevor are real people who care about helping you, not just making money. Always on time and handle everything without delay.

reviews.name: John L.
reviews.text: Trevor and his crew gave us a great price on ductwork and new unit installation. Super knowledgeable, punctual, and respectful.

reviews.name: Tracy M.
reviews.text: Same-day service when I needed it most. Called ahead, arrived on time, extremely polite and quickly identified the problem.

reviews.name: Rebecca W.
reviews.text: Other companies quoted $9K-$12K for complete replacement. Tony diagnosed the real issue and saved us thousands. More than 5 stars.

service_areas.label: COVERAGE AREA
service_areas.heading: Serving Wilmington & Beyond
service_areas.subheading: Same honest service throughout the Cape Fear region

cta.heading: Ready for Honest HVAC Service?
cta.body: No games, no upsells. Just straight talk about what your system needs and what it'll cost. Call Tony directly.
